ogTitle: Katandra vs Katandra West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Katandra and Katandra West.
heading: Katandra vs Katandra West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Katandra, Victoria and Katandra West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Katandra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Katandra West (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Katandra or Katandra West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Katandra has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Katandra West scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Katandra scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Katandra West scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Katandra or Katandra West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Katandra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
